notableEvents.label: Dansby Swanson GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Dansby Swanson grounds into a double play, shortstop Cooper Pratt to second baseman Brice Turang to first baseman Andrew Vaughn. Matt Shaw out at 2nd. Dansby Swanson out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Michael Conforto pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Michael Conforto singles on a fly ball to center fielder Garrett Mitchell.

notableEvents.label: Michael Conforto pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Michael Conforto flies out sharply to center fielder Garrett Mitchell.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: David Hamilton steals (17) 2nd base. David Hamilton to 3rd. David Hamilton advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by catcher Carson Kelly.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run
